title: Bat Removal & Exclusion in Glendale, Queens | $900-$2,500
metaDescription: Professional bat removal and exclusion services in Glendale, Queens. Safe, humane bat control for homes and businesses. Licensed experts. Call today for a free estimate!
intro: Dealing with bats in your Glendale home or business? Best Pest Control NYC provides expert bat removal and exclusion services tailored to the unique needs of Glendale properties. Our licensed technicians use humane, effective methods to safely remove bats and prevent their return, protecting your property and family.
whyUs: With over 15 years serving Queens communities, we understand Glendale's diverse housing stock from pre-war brick homes to modern multi-family buildings. Our bat specialists are fully licensed, insured, and trained in the latest exclusion techniques, ensuring complete removal with guaranteed results.
localContext: Glendale's tree-lined streets and proximity to Forest Park and the Lutheran All-Faiths Cemetery create ideal habitats for bats seeking roosting sites in attics, chimneys, and wall voids. The neighborhood's historic homes and older apartment buildings often have small entry points that bats exploit, making professional exclusion essential for long-term protection.

faqs.question: How much does bat removal cost in Glendale, Queens?
faqs.answer: Bat removal and exclusion services in Glendale typically range from $900 to $2,500, depending on the size of the colony, entry points, and the extent of exclusion work needed. We provide free inspections and detailed estimates before beginning any work.

faqs.question: Is bat removal in NYC legal and humane?
faqs.answer: Yes, our bat removal methods are both legal and humane. We follow all NYC and New York State regulations, using exclusion devices that allow bats to leave safely but prevent re-entry. We never harm bats, as they are protected and beneficial for controlling insect populations.

faqs.question: What does the bat exclusion process involve?
faqs.answer: Our comprehensive process includes a thorough inspection to identify all entry points, installation of one-way exclusion devices, sealing of secondary entry points, and monitoring to ensure all bats have left. After exclusion, we seal all openings and can provide attic cleanup and sanitization services if needed.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove bats from my Glendale property?
faqs.answer: We can typically schedule an inspection within 24-48 hours. The exclusion process itself takes 3-7 days depending on colony size and weather conditions, as bats must leave naturally through one-way devices. Note that bat removal in NYC is restricted during maternity season (May-August) when flightless young are present.
